sourceMovie.title: Spermageddon
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Spermageddon for the same reason it broke through in 2024: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a adventure rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Tommy Wirkola keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The animation and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Wendell & Wild
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Spermageddon clicked for you, Wendell & Wild (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Spermageddon clicked for you, The House (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and fantasy, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Spermageddon?
faq.answer: Try Wendell & Wild, The House, Stewie Griffin: The Untold Story—each shares DNA with Spermageddon while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Spermageddon?
faq.answer: Spermageddon (2024) is best described as Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Spermageddon worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this animation lane.
